title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Country Delight

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Country Delight
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Country Delight! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!
